title: deer-flow.cycle.snapshot v1
description: Point-in-time renderable view of a stack-tuner cycle. Fires on status transitions (started, in_progress after each stage, completed, failed, cancelled) so dashboards can show live progress without waiting for cycle.done. Complements deer-flow.stack-tuner.cycle.done.v1 (terminal) and deer-flow.metaprobe.cycle.v1 (rollup). Source: /deer-flow/stack-tuner. SUPERSEDED (2026-07-03, correcting the 2026-07-02 ecosystem audit's 'GHOST producer' finding): a fully-built, tested producer for this event existed on an unmerged deer-flow branch (cycle-snapshot-v1, dated 2026-05-31) — but hearth's nbus_consumer.rs deliberately removed this event from its dispatch table two days later (commit 64abe03c, 2026-05-29) in favor of a different, already-live vocabulary: deer-flow.research.cycle.started.v1 / deer-flow.research.cycle.completed.v1, which the ResearchDispatchConsumer pipeline actually feeds (cycle_results table, /api/cycles/:id/results route). hearth has a locked-in regression test (dispatch_routes_deer_flow_real_event_vocabulary) asserting deer-flow.cycle.snapshot.v1 must route to 'unhandled'. Merging the old branch would make deer-flow emit this event again with no live consumer on the other end — recreating the same ghost-producer problem under a technically-not-ghost-but-still-unconsumed state. The unmerged branch was intentionally NOT merged; do not resurrect it without also restoring a hearth-side handler, which is a design decision, not a mechanical fix. See deer-flow.research.cycle.started.v1 / .completed.v1 for the live equivalent.

cycle_id.description: Unique cycle identifier — matches cycle.start subject and all stage.* events

status.description: Current lifecycle status at the moment of this snapshot

question_class.description: Router classification of the question (trivial, general, strategic, surgical)

question.description: First 200 chars of the question being explored

verdict.description: Terminal verdict when status is completed or failed; null while in_progress

score.description: Current best score — may update as stages complete

lift.description: Score delta over pre-cycle baseline — null until at least one stage scores

wall_elapsed_s.description: Seconds elapsed since cycle start at snapshot time

cumulative_cost_usd.description: Accumulated model cost in USD at snapshot time

stage_count.description: Total stages planned for this cycle

stages_completed.description: Stages that have finished (ok or error) at snapshot time

error.description: Error summary when status is failed; null otherwise

started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC — when this cycle began
